an5.201:1.0.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Kimbilā in aniculagrove.Then the Venerable Kimbila approached the Blessed One, paid homage to him, sat down to one side, and said:
an5.201:1.0.2: "What is the cause and reason why, Bhante, the good Dhamma continues long after a Tathāgata has attained final nibbāna?"
